decision_basis: possibleSolution=1 (accredit); accreditationDecision=5; ОП відповідає критеріям, виявлені слабкі сторони є несуттєвими
key_finding: The Expert Group identified separate methodology courses for mathematics (5.5 ECTS) and informatics (4 ECTS) and noted both are present, but made no remark about the balance or ratio between the two subject specialities. The case shows that NAQA accreditation of a dual-subject programme can proceed with neither parity pressure nor asymmetry critique when both subjects have dedicated coverage.
